uplink.description: battery + temperature + humidity + CO2 (climate + air-quality requires covered)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method (ran reference/upstream-codec.js on this input, then mapped temperature/humidity/co2 -> air.* and battery % -> batteryPercent). Upstream produced {battery:88,temperature:23,humidity:45,co2:456}.
Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising two's-complement negative temperature; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method (upstream produced {temperature:-10,humidity:35}).

uplink.description: PIR activity + light + CO2 + TVOC + pressure (extras + air-quality requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the full TLV set; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method (upstream produced {activity:5,illumination:16,infrared_and_visible:32,infrared:8,co2:500,tvoc:100,pressure:1011.8}). illumination -> air.lightIntensity (lux), pressure within vocabulary bounds 900-1100.
Synthetic error vector: empty byte array yields the empty-payload error guard.
Synthetic error vector: an unknown channel/type breaks the parse loop before any recognized channel, yielding the no-recognized-channels error.
